TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Seejiq sun, niqan egu bi malu endaan rudan sbiyaw, saw ka pstrung ka risaw ni uuwa, psalu kingal bgurah sapah, saw ka phuma masu - asi ka "smgasuc" meysa utux rudan, pkeiyah egu hiyi masu. Sbiyaw balay 5 idas do prajing hmuma ni tmukuy masu da, kiya ni muda smapuh hmuma, jiyax siida asi ka mrbu balay tutuy ni phlama hlama masu ssapuh dha, pusu ranaq tahuc sapah o ini tduwa phing, smapuh siida, pusu ranaq nii o sranaq tahuc, dsun ka pnhlman masu ni sinaw ni payay ni parih, dsun dha empsapuh kana ka nii ni dsun dha qnpahan. Plalay musa qnpahan kingal empsapuh, mangan parih sqbuh na dhgal, smapuh pnhuma, kiya ni meysa snbliqan utux ni taysaw emphru kana ka pnhuma, nhdu smapuh do, hmliq cipiq hlama masu ni spawsa na ska spuhan, hmrig cikux sinaw , mnsngari hlama masu ni sinaw o sugun mkan dha empsapuh. Kiya ni wada musa qnpahan kingal empsapuh duri, wada muda saw uuda spuhax, kika nii o smapuh hmuma sun. Empitu idas - prajing tmatak, maxal idas - mhada ka masu do miing kingal jiyax muda qnburung, knkingal sapah o prajing musa qnpahan kmtuy bnkiyal masu dsun sapah, kingal bnkiyan o qyanun sida qhuni, kingal bnkiyan o phmaun qnpahan, nhdu qnburun do, mangal kingal bnkiyan duri sqaya damux rpun. mrbu jiyax spuhan, seejiq alang o miing dha seejiq lmawa utux, meysa smbliqan, nhdu kana ka smapuh do, smwayay kana ka sejiq, ini tduwa embrinah qmita, manu ka saw nii o kika smapuh kmtuy. Saw nii kingal hnkawas empxal muda ka smapuh o sprun dha balay, nasi niqan ka smliq gaya ssapuh o, ini sbliqi utux ruda ka pnegalang dni naqih kana ka pnhuma, kiya ni lmawa empsapuh taysaw miyah dmayaw ksblaiq rmngaw utux rudan, seejiq smliq gaya nii o asaw ka psruwa ruciq brah utux rudan, taysaw ssruwa ruciq. Egu balay ka gaya seejiq wada muungac da, wana ta embahang smmnru rudan tada, tlami lmlung binaw, ita seejiq o asaw ta ka smparu gaya, prtuday ta muda ka gaya ta, tay saw pniqun ta ka rmun rudan, dhuq sayang ana bitaq knuwan.
S.PHON: səəɟiq sun, niqan əgu bi malu əndaan ɾudan sbijaw, saw ka pstɾuŋ ka ɾisaw ni uuwa, psalu kiŋal bguɾaħ sapaħ, saw ka pħuma masu - asi ka "smgasuʦ" məsa utux ɾudan, pkəijaħ əgu ħiji masu. sbijaw balaj * idas do pɾaɟiŋ ħmuma ni tmukuj masu da, kija ni muda smapuħ ħmuma, ɟijax siida asi ka mɾbu balaj tutuj ni pħlama ħlama masu ssapuħ dħa, pusu ɾanaq taħuʦ sapaħ o ini tduwa pħiŋ, smapuħ siida, pusu ɾanaq nii o sɾanaq taħuʦ, dsun ka pnħlman masu ni sinaw ni pajaj ni paɾiħ, dsun dħa əmpsapuħ kana ka nii ni dsun dħa qnpaħan. plalaj musa qnpaħan kiŋal əmpsapuħ, maŋan paɾiħ sqbuħ na dħgal, smapuħ pnħuma, kija ni məsa snbliqan utux ni tajsaw əmpħɾu kana ka pnħuma, nħdu smapuħ do, ħmliq ʦipiq ħlama masu ni spawsa na ska spuħan, ħmɾig ʦikux sinaw , mnsŋaɾi ħlama masu ni sinaw o sugun mkan dħa əmpsapuħ. kija ni wada musa qnpaħan kiŋal əmpsapuħ duɾi, wada muda saw uuda spuħax, kika nii o smapuħ ħmuma sun. əmpitu idas - pɾaɟiŋ tmatak, maxal idas - mħada ka masu do miiŋ kiŋal ɟijax muda qnbuɾuŋ, knkiŋal sapaħ o pɾaɟiŋ musa qnpaħan kmtuj bnkijal masu dsun sapaħ, kiŋal bnkijan o qjanun sida qħuni, kiŋal bnkijan o pħmaun qnpaħan, nħdu qnbuɾun do, maŋal kiŋal bnkijan duɾi sqaja damux ɾpun. mɾbu ɟijax spuħan, səəɟiq alaŋ o miiŋ dħa səəɟiq lmawa utux, məsa smbliqan, nħdu kana ka smapuħ do, smwajaj kana ka səɟiq, ini tduwa əmbɾinaħ qmita, manu ka saw nii o kika smapuħ kmtuj. saw nii kiŋal ħnkawas əmpxal muda ka smapuħ o spɾun dħa balaj, nasi niqan ka smliq gaja ssapuħ o, ini sbliqi utux ɾuda ka pnəgalaŋ dni naqiħ kana ka pnħuma, kija ni lmawa əmpsapuħ tajsaw mijaħ dmajaw ksblaiq ɾmŋaw utux ɾudan, səəɟiq smliq gaja nii o asaw ka psɾuwa ɾuʦiq bɾaħ utux ɾudan, tajsaw ssɾuwa ɾuʦiq. əgu balaj ka gaja səəɟiq wada muuŋaʦ da, wana ta əmbaħaŋ smmnɾu ɾudan tada, tlami lmluŋ binaw, ita səəɟiq o asaw ta ka smpaɾu gaja, pɾtudaj ta muda ka gaja ta, taj saw pniqun ta ka ɾmun ɾudan, dħuq sajaŋ ana bitaq knuwan.
S.FORM: Seejiq sun, niqan egu bi malu endaan rudan sbiyaw, saw ka pstrung ka risaw ni uuwa, psalu kingal bgurah sapah, saw ka phuma masu - asi ka "smgasuc" meysa utux rudan, pkeiyah egu hiyi masu. Sbiyaw balay 5 idas do prajing hmuma ni tmukuy masu da, kiya ni muda smapuh hmuma, jiyax siida asi ka mrbu balay tutuy ni phlama hlama masu ssapuh dha, pusu ranaq tahuc sapah o ini tduwa phing, smapuh siida, pusu ranaq nii o sranaq tahuc, dsun ka pnhlman masu ni sinaw ni payay ni parih, dsun dha empsapuh kana ka nii ni dsun dha qnpahan. Plalay musa qnpahan kingal empsapuh, mangan parih sqbuh na dhgal, smapuh pnhuma, kiya ni meysa snbliqan utux ni taysaw emphru kana ka pnhuma, nhdu smapuh do, hmliq cipiq hlama masu ni spawsa na ska spuhan, hmrig cikux sinaw , mnsngari hlama masu ni sinaw o sugun mkan dha empsapuh. Kiya ni wada musa qnpahan kingal empsapuh duri, wada muda saw uuda spuhax, kika nii o smapuh hmuma sun. Empitu idas - prajing tmatak, maxal idas - mhada ka masu do miing kingal jiyax muda qnburung, knkingal sapah o prajing musa qnpahan kmtuy bnkiyal masu dsun sapah, kingal bnkiyan o qyanun sida qhuni, kingal bnkiyan o phmaun qnpahan, nhdu qnburun do, mangal kingal bnkiyan duri sqaya damux rpun. mrbu jiyax spuhan, seejiq alang o miing dha seejiq lmawa utux, meysa smbliqan, nhdu kana ka smapuh do, smwayay kana ka sejiq, ini tduwa embrinah qmita, manu ka saw nii o kika smapuh kmtuy. Saw nii kingal hnkawas empxal muda ka smapuh o sprun dha balay, nasi niqan ka smliq gaya ssapuh o, ini sbliqi utux ruda ka pnegalang dni naqih kana ka pnhuma, kiya ni lmawa empsapuh taysaw miyah dmayaw ksblaiq rmngaw utux rudan, seejiq smliq gaya nii o asaw ka psruwa ruciq brah utux rudan, taysaw ssruwa ruciq. Egu balay ka gaya seejiq wada muungac da, wana ta embahang smmnru rudan tada, tlami lmlung binaw, ita seejiq o asaw ta ka smparu gaya, prtuday ta muda ka gaya ta, tay saw pniqun ta ka rmun rudan, dhuq sayang ana bitaq knuwan.
S.PHON: səəɟiq sun, niqan əgu bi malu əndaan ɾudan sbijaw, saw ka pstɾuŋ ka ɾisaw ni uuwa, psalu kiŋal bguɾaħ sapaħ, saw ka pħuma masu - asi ka "smgasuʦ" məsa utux ɾudan, pkəijaħ əgu ħiji masu. sbijaw balaj * idas do pɾaɟiŋ ħmuma ni tmukuj masu da, kija ni muda smapuħ ħmuma, ɟijax siida asi ka mɾbu balaj tutuj ni pħlama ħlama masu ssapuħ dħa, pusu ɾanaq taħuʦ sapaħ o ini tduwa pħiŋ, smapuħ siida, pusu ɾanaq nii o sɾanaq taħuʦ, dsun ka pnħlman masu ni sinaw ni pajaj ni paɾiħ, dsun dħa əmpsapuħ kana ka nii ni dsun dħa qnpaħan. plalaj musa qnpaħan kiŋal əmpsapuħ, maŋan paɾiħ sqbuħ na dħgal, smapuħ pnħuma, kija ni məsa snbliqan utux ni tajsaw əmpħɾu kana ka pnħuma, nħdu smapuħ do, ħmliq ʦipiq ħlama masu ni spawsa na ska spuħan, ħmɾig ʦikux sinaw , mnsŋaɾi ħlama masu ni sinaw o sugun mkan dħa əmpsapuħ. kija ni wada musa qnpaħan kiŋal əmpsapuħ duɾi, wada muda saw uuda spuħax, kika nii o smapuħ ħmuma sun. əmpitu idas - pɾaɟiŋ tmatak, maxal idas - mħada ka masu do miiŋ kiŋal ɟijax muda qnbuɾuŋ, knkiŋal sapaħ o pɾaɟiŋ musa qnpaħan kmtuj bnkijal masu dsun sapaħ, kiŋal bnkijan o qjanun sida qħuni, kiŋal bnkijan o pħmaun qnpaħan, nħdu qnbuɾun do, maŋal kiŋal bnkijan duɾi sqaja damux ɾpun. mɾbu ɟijax spuħan, səəɟiq alaŋ o miiŋ dħa səəɟiq lmawa utux, məsa smbliqan, nħdu kana ka smapuħ do, smwajaj kana ka səɟiq, ini tduwa əmbɾinaħ qmita, manu ka saw nii o kika smapuħ kmtuj. saw nii kiŋal ħnkawas əmpxal muda ka smapuħ o spɾun dħa balaj, nasi niqan ka smliq gaja ssapuħ o, ini sbliqi utux ɾuda ka pnəgalaŋ dni naqiħ kana ka pnħuma, kija ni lmawa əmpsapuħ tajsaw mijaħ dmajaw ksblaiq ɾmŋaw utux ɾudan, səəɟiq smliq gaja nii o asaw ka psɾuwa ɾuʦiq bɾaħ utux ɾudan, tajsaw ssɾuwa ɾuʦiq. əgu balaj ka gaja səəɟiq wada muuŋaʦ da, wana ta əmbaħaŋ smmnɾu ɾudan tada, tlami lmluŋ binaw, ita səəɟiq o asaw ta ka smpaɾu gaja, pɾtudaj ta muda ka gaja ta, taj saw pniqun ta ka ɾmun ɾudan, dħuq sajaŋ ana bitaq knuwan.
